name: Valid FTP estimate payload
description: Checks that a valid power profile returns an FTP estimate.

name: Missing power curve
description: Returns a clear validation message when power curve is missing.

name: Open FTP trend chart
description: User can open chart view and see rendered trend points.

name: Weekly load response shape
description: Response includes total load and period boundaries.

name: Empty week fallback
description: Weeks without rides still return a stable response payload.

name: Compare card delta visibility
description: Delta indicator appears when two weeks are available.

name: Import fresh activities
description: New activities are appended after successful import.

name: Expired token handling
description: Shows a clear error state when Strava token is expired.

name: Ignore duplicate activity ids
description: Duplicate ids do not create extra timeline entries.

name: Timeline newest first
description: Timeline renders newest activities at the top.

name: Filter by date range
description: Timeline narrows to chosen date range values.

name: Profile save persists
description: Saved profile values remain visible after refresh.

name: Required profile fields
description: Missing required fields are highlighted before submit.

name: Toggle email preference
description: Email notification preference can be enabled and disabled.

name: Preview summary text
description: Preview explains current notification settings in plain language.
